// AutoLoot: Reading order: every // key is documentation; real settings follow in the same order. DebugLogging through NoDuplicateNames.
// DebugLogging: When true, logs PostGenerateTreasure entry and early-return reasons to Ace_Log (verbose; disable after debugging).
// DepositLootedCurrencyToBank: When true, looted pyreal stacks and trade notes are credited to banked pyreals (PropertyInt64) instead of inventory.
// BankCashProperty: Must match LeyLineLedger Settings.CashProperty when using that mod (default 39999).
// LootProfilePath: Folder for .utl loot profiles. Default empty: PatchClass sets Path.Combine(ModPath, "LootProfiles") after load. Override to any server path; /autoloot creates the folder if missing.
// DefaultProfile: Profile auto-enabled the first time a player uses /autoloot in a session. Empty string = no profile active by default.
// NoDuplicateNames: Name substrings (case-insensitive): if an item matches and the player already has same WCID in inventory, skip loot — reduces quest-timer bypass via stockpiling. Add more fragments as needed.
